loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Fresh validation is preferred; policy may require it for high-risk semantic gates.

next_loop.reason: The next compiler loop should start from the build handoff, not the producing compiler context.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

requirements.text: Decompose the alignment-hardening work into a detailed sprint with focused tasks.

evidence_mapping.criterion: Sprint has focused tasks instead of one opaque refactor.
evidence_mapping.evidence: SPRINT-003 contains TASK-077 umbrella plus TASK-078 through TASK-085, each with outcome, acceptance, non-goals, verification, spec paths, and code paths.

evidence_mapping.criterion: Tasks cover all accepted alignment principles.
evidence_mapping.evidence: TASK-078 covers graph, TASK-079 audit, TASK-080 gateway policy, TASK-081 file/package checks, TASK-082 build traceability/classification, TASK-083 dogfood boundary, TASK-084 publication proof, TASK-085 fixtures.

summary: Planned SPRINT-003 Alignment hardening with umbrella TASK-077 and child tasks TASK-078 through TASK-085 for graph, audit, gateway, file/package checks, traceability, dogfood boundary, publication proof, and regression fixtures.
task_changes: Created SPRINT-003 Alignment hardening as active sprint.
Restored TASK-077 as sprint umbrella rather than one opaque implementation task.
Created TASK-079 audit engine and /audit command.
Created TASK-080 gateway policies wired to audit/content proof.
Created TASK-081 file-structure and package reachability audits.
Created TASK-082 semantic build traceability and change classification.
Created TASK-083 dogfood boundary in prompts/templates/docs.
Created TASK-085 alignment drift regression fixtures.

tdd_plan: Start each implementation task with one failing fixture or smoke assertion for its drift class.
Keep audit and graph checks deterministic and fixture-backed.
Use gateway policy tests for missing evidence block vs valid evidence pass.
Run typecheck, architecture, smoke, and package/security checks for relevant tasks.
